metadata.tagline: Enhance your inner energy and well-being
metadata.purpose: Detailed visual dashboard with FULL scripts and guidance

approaches.script: Hey man, quick question — do you ever feel like your energy and drive just aren't what they used to be? I work with a product called Rocket by Super Patch that helps men naturally boost their vitality and energy, completely drug-free. What do you currently do to keep your energy levels up?

Hey, remember when you were saying you've been feeling more run down lately? I started using Rocket from Super Patch and honestly the difference in my energy and overall vitality has been night and day — and it's totally drug-free. Want me to tell you more about how it works?

Hey! I saw you've been grinding hard lately — respect. I've been using something called Rocket by Super Patch that's been helping me stay energized and feeling like myself again, no supplements or prescriptions needed. Have you ever looked into natural options for boosting your vitality?

Hey, [mutual friend] thought we should connect — he mentioned you've been looking for a natural way to get your energy back. I work with Rocket from Super Patch, which is designed specifically for men's vitality and energy enhancement, completely drug-free. Would you be up for a quick conversation about it?

So what keeps you busy these days? I ask because a lot of guys I talk to say they wish they had more energy to keep up with everything. I work with Rocket by Super Patch — it's a drug-free patch that helps men reclaim their vitality and drive. What does staying on top of your game look like for you?

questions.question: How would you say your energy and drive compare now to how you felt five or ten years ago?
What does feeling like your best self look like for you — physically, mentally, and in terms of confidence?
At what point in the day do you notice your energy and motivation really start to drop off?
Has the dip in vitality started affecting your confidence or how you show up in your relationship?
Do you find yourself avoiding things you used to enjoy — the gym, being active, staying out — because you just don't have the energy anymore?
If you could feel ten years younger with the energy and drive to match, what would you do differently starting tomorrow?
How much do you think getting your vitality back would change the way you feel about yourself and your day-to-day life?
What have you tried so far to get your edge back — testosterone supplements, energy drinks, prescriptions, anything like that?
How do you feel about the idea of a natural, drug-free approach versus going the pharmaceutical route for something like this?
If there was something simple you could wear every day that supported your vitality and energy without any pills or side effects, would that interest you?

content.problem: You used to have that drive — the energy, the confidence, the feeling that you could take on anything. But lately, something's shifted. You're moving slower, feeling less motivated, and you know deep down you're not showing up the way you used to.
content.agitate: It starts affecting everything — your confidence takes a hit, your relationships feel the strain, and you find yourself avoiding the things you used to enjoy. Maybe you've skipped the gym, pulled back socially, or just accepted that this is what getting older feels like. And talking about it? Most guys won't, which means they suffer in silence while things keep sliding. {{discovery_callback}}
content.solve: That's why Rocket exists. It uses Vibrotactile Technology — VTT — to support your body's natural vitality pathways, helping you reclaim that energy, drive, and confidence without prescriptions, hormones, or side effects. You just wear the patch and it works with your body's own signals to reignite what's been fading. Rocket is a drug-free way to feel like the man you know you still are.

objections.response: I get it — let's put it in perspective. Testosterone therapy runs hundreds a month with doctor visits, bloodwork, and prescriptions. Vitality supplements stack up fast too. Rocket costs less per day than most of those and supports your energy and confidence naturally without any prescriptions or needles. What would feeling like your best self again be worth to you and the people who depend on you?
objections.psychology: Reframe cost against testosterone therapy, clinic visits, and stacking expensive vitality supplements

objections.response: No rush at all, man. Can I ask — is it the idea of natural vitality support you're unsure about, or is it more that you're wondering if Rocket can really deliver without prescriptions or hormones? A lot of guys feel that way because they've been told the only real option is testosterone therapy. Rocket uses VTT technology to support your body's own energy and vitality response — nothing synthetic. What's the main thing holding you back?
objections.psychology: Surface the real concern — usually doubt that anything non-pharmaceutical can restore masculine vitality

objections.response: Smart move — and honestly, your partner is probably going to be your biggest supporter on this one. When you bring it up, they'll want to know it's safe: Rocket is 100% drug-free, no testosterone, no hormones, no prescriptions needed. It supports your natural vitality and energy. The benefits show up in how you feel, your energy, your confidence — things they'll notice too. What questions do you think they'd want answered?
objections.psychology: Position the spouse as an ally who benefits directly from his improved energy and confidence

objections.response: I respect that — the men's vitality space is full of 'miracle pills' and questionable supplements that overpromise. Here's what makes Rocket different: it uses Vibrotactile Technology to support your body's natural vitality response — no testosterone, no hormones, no stimulants entering your body. It's not a pill you swallow hoping for the best. It works with your own neural signals. What would you need to feel or experience to know it's making a difference?
objections.psychology: Validate skepticism from the male enhancement supplement industry, then differentiate VTT from hormone treatments and pills

objections.response: I hear you — a lot of guys have tried testosterone boosters, energy supplements, or even looked into TRT and either didn't see results or didn't like the side effects. What was the worst part of those experiences? Rocket is a completely different approach — it doesn't put any substance into your body. VTT technology works with your natural neural signals to support vitality and energy from within. No hormones, no cycling on and off. What was missing from what you tried before?
objections.psychology: Normalize the cycle of failed vitality products and position Rocket as a non-hormonal, side-effect-free alternative

objections.response: No worries, brother. Just out of curiosity — is it that you're feeling great with your energy and vitality right now, or is it more that you've written off products in this space because of past experiences? If it's the second one, I totally get it. Rocket isn't another testosterone booster or energy pill — it works with your body's own signals through drug-free VTT technology. What would a real vitality solution need to look like for you to give it a shot?
objections.psychology: Distinguish between genuine satisfaction and protective cynicism built from the male supplement industry

objections.response: That's the thing — Rocket is literally zero effort. No clinic appointments, no pills to time around meals, no injection schedule. You wear the patch and it supports your vitality and energy while you handle your day. Think about it: how much time and energy are you losing because you're running on empty? Rocket could help you show up with more drive for the things that actually matter. How's your energy holding up right now with everything on your plate?
objections.psychology: Flip the time objection — low vitality is the real time thief, and Rocket requires no appointments or routines

objections.response: Good question — what are you looking at? Most men's vitality options are either testosterone replacement therapy with doctor visits, bloodwork, and potential side effects, or supplement stacks with questionable ingredients. Rocket uses Vibrotactile Technology — nothing enters your body. No hormones, no prescriptions, no cycling. It supports your natural energy and vitality through your body's own neural responses. Have you found anything else that's truly drug-free and doesn't require a prescription or doctor supervision?
objections.psychology: Position VTT as the only approach that delivers vitality support without hormones, prescriptions, or medical oversight

6_closing.title: 🏆 5 CLOSING TECHNIQUES
6_closing.pre_close: Always ask: 'Do you have any questions?' + 'Does this make sense?'

techniques.name: ASSUMPTIVE
techniques.script: Brother, I can tell you're ready to feel like you're in your prime again. Let's get Rocket headed your way so you can get that energy and confidence back. What's the best shipping address?
techniques.when: They've opened up about missing their peak energy and drive, clearly motivated to make a change

techniques.name: ALTERNATIVE
techniques.script: Would you like the 30-day supply to start feeling that renewed energy and drive, or the 90-day pack to really get back in your prime and lock in that confidence boost long-term?
techniques.when: They're interested but weighing options, have talked about wanting sustained vitality not just a quick fix

techniques.name: URGENCY
techniques.script: We've got a promotion ending this week — and every day you wait is another day you're not feeling like the man you know you can be. Let's lock this in and get that energy and drive back starting now.
techniques.when: They want their vitality back but keep putting off the decision, need a push to commit today

techniques.name: SUMMARY
techniques.script: So you want to feel like you're in your prime again — renewed energy, more drive, and that confidence boost — all drug-free with no prescriptions, no hormones, no side effects. That's exactly what Rocket delivers. Ready to get back in the game?
techniques.when: In-depth conversation about declining energy, lost confidence, and past failed supplements — need to bring it all together

techniques.name: REFERRAL
techniques.script: You mentioned some buddies who've been dealing with the same kind of slowdown. Who else do you know who'd want to feel like they're in their prime again? I'd be happy to connect with them too.
techniques.when: After the sale, they're fired up about reclaiming their vitality and have mentioned friends or buddies with similar energy and confidence concerns

7_followup.title: 📅 FOLLOW-UP SEQUENCE
7_followup.goal: Build relationship → Get testimonials → Generate referrals

sequence.template: Hey {{FirstName}}! Just confirming your samples are on the way. You should receive them in about 2 days. I'll check back in when they arrive!
Hey {{FirstName}}! Your samples should be arriving today or tomorrow. Have they shown up yet? Let me know when they do — don't open them without me!
Before we open it, I want you to understand. This isn't about hype. It's about experience. I want you to pay attention to what you notice, not what you expect.

Hey {{FirstName}}, checking in! What did you notice today?
What felt different?
When did you feel it most?
What surprised you?
How is your vitality? Noticing any changes in your energy, drive, or overall confidence? What feels different?
Hope you're loving the results! Ready to keep the momentum going? Who else do you know that wants to take their vitality to the next level?
Based on everything you've experienced — are you ready to make this part of your routine? Let's get you set up.
